channel.title: Azure Backup on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Backup on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Bulk Restore for Azure Virtual Machines using Azure Backup
item.description:
Azure Backup adds Bulk Restore for Azure Virtual Machines in public preview. Customers can restore up to 100 VMs in a single operation to simplify large-scale recovery.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Backup for Elastic SAN
item.description:
Azure Backup now supports Elastic SAN in public preview. It can back up and restore Elastic SAN volumes to help protect against accidental deletion, ransomware, and application-related changes.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Configure AKS backup using a single Azure CLI command
item.description:
Azure Backup now supports configuring backup for Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) clusters with a single Azure CLI command. This reduces the manual steps previously required to install and set up the backup extension and related components.

  • Source: Azure Updates
